title: astragalus stewartii
intro: Astragalus stewartii, also known as Stewart's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus stewartii include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus stewartii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
